meaning: adj.<美俚>(活跃在)大西洋和太平洋东西海岸的
examples: Think bicoastal travel has to be a bore? That is so last century! Follow these simple steps to turn your itinerary from drab to fab!
More than 500 volunteers are trained for 40 hours to run the bicoastal call centers.
He does broad comedy and hardly wields the kind of cutting-edge style favored by the bicoastal elites.
Lamb says the region can support another 3, 000 units without going bicoastal.
